name: Orrin Hatch
description: American politician (1934–2022) – Former United States Senator and Former President Pro Tempore of the United States Senate (2015-2019)
abstract: Orrin Grant Hatch (March 22, 1934 – April 23, 2022) was an American attorney and politician who served as a United States senator from Utah from 1977 to 2019. Hatch's 42-year Senate tenure made him the longest-serving Republican U.S.

about_quotes.speaker: Jon Hendricks
about_quotes.evidence: They’ve listened to Orrin Hatch try to justify the fact that he is humane enough to run for president while citing the fact, that, “I have many Jewish friends — I have this 92-year old lady who is a Jewish lady, a very good friend of mine.”
about_quotes.doc_title: Jon Hendricks interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000 [interview 2 of 2]
